title: 16S rRNA-gene Sequencing Data used for "Potentiated zinc and monovalent copper oxide as dietary supplements for weanling piglets: effects on systemic and mucosal immunity, gut permeability and fecal microbiota composition"
author: Biscarini, Filippo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
These are the data used for the gut microbiome experiment reported in the article "Potentiated zinc and monovalent copper oxide as dietary supplements for weanling piglets: effects on systemic and mucosal immunity, gut permeability and fecal microbiota composition" (Frontiers in Veterinary Science; Manuscript ID: 1647844). 
 - 56 samples from 28 pigs (4 experimental groups, 7 pigs each; two time points) 
 
 data_submission.zip: compressed archive that contains the fastq files (paired-end sequencing: R1 nd R2: 112 files) 
 gut-microbiome-pigs-metadata.csv: file of metadata; the field (column) "sample" contains a number which corresponds to the first number in the fastq files (e.g. 49_*.fastq.gz)
